tiny_practice.action: Close your eyes and take three deep breaths, reflecting on how your personal character matters more than material wealth

two_step.reflect_question: How am I currently building or protecting my reputation?

options.response: Continue practicing honesty in small and large matters
Review current relationships and distance from toxic connections
Commit to daily learning and spiritual growth

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a path with two routes: one with thorns (representing perverse choices) and another clear path (representing wise choices)

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter challenged your view of success?
options: Wealth is less important than character
Humility is a key to true prosperity

three_choice.question: Which aspect of wisdom resonates most deeply with you?

choices.text: A good name matters more than wealth
choices.expansion: Character and reputation provide deeper fulfillment than monetary accumulation.
God views human worth beyond social stratification and material circumstances.
Wisdom involves anticipating consequences and strategically avoiding dangerous paths.

socratic_nudge.question: If reputation is truly more valuable than riches, what investments are you making in your character that cannot be measured monetarily?

moral_slider.question: How do humility and divine reverence interact with personal achievement?

reevaluation.question: How might this chapter challenge your current understanding of success?
options: Character matters more than I previously thought

thematic_summaries.title: Divine Equality and Human Worth
thematic_summaries.summary: God views all individuals equally, regardless of economic status. The Creator establishes inherent value beyond material wealth and social standing. Human dignity transcends financial circumstances.

thematic_summaries.title: Wisdom and Spiritual Discernment
thematic_summaries.summary: True wisdom emerges from humility and reverence toward God. Spiritual perception allows believers to anticipate potential dangers and navigate life's challenges strategically. Prudence is a divine gift enabling spiritual protection.

reevaluation.question: How does divine sovereignty interact with human economic diversity?
options: God orchestrates economic circumstances as part of spiritual refinement
Economic status reflects individual merit and spiritual faithfulness
Wealth distribution demonstrates God's complex redemptive purposes
Economic differences are primarily result of systemic social structures
